title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Anjali shares her woes with the women of Gokuldham society, they ask her to watch out and talk to Taarak. Later, things get messier when Taarak receives phone calls with romantic messages.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak confesses that he has no clue about the events happening. Later, things get worse for Taarak when the mysterious woman says that she is coming to meet him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Daya end up getting into a funny situation. Meanwhile, another girl catches Popatlal's fancy.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Koyal's arrival brings a lot of excitement to everyone in society. Daya invites the Mehtas and Koyal for a meal. Meanwhile, Popatlal tries his best to get friendly with Koyal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Taarak Mehta try to convince Popatlal to stop thinking that he can flirt with Koyal. However, Popatlal has his own plans.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After spending a day of sightseeing and shopping with Koyal, Popatlal prepares to host a surprise party without knowing that someone is going to prank him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Popatlal gets ready to make his mysterious big announcement, the Mehtas firmly ask Koyal to come clean.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone in Gokuldham Society is shocked when Popatlal consumes poison, but he later wakes up and explains himself.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Goli's uncle and aunt come to visit Gokuldham Society with their smug son Monty. However, as soon as Monty meets Tapu, he challenges the leader of Tapu Sena and angers him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Tapu and his friends commence their night cricket, Goli's rude cousin joins them and wreaks havoc in the match.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena's plans for a night cricket match enrages Bhide. When he quarrels with Jethalal about it, Taarak proposes a cricket match between the two.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham Society excitedly prepare to participate in their very first cricket match. Rival captains Bhide and Jethalal choose their team members.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide and Jethalal's teams receive flashy names and sponsors for Gokuldham Premier League and the preparations for the big cricket match begin.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Gokuldham Premier League approaches, the showdowns between Bhide and Jethalal's teams begin. They hold a meeting to discuss the rules of the grand match.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After he wears the sweater, Jethalal has to face many obstacles. His day at work also starts to get affected.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After a long and tiring day, Jethalal prays that he does not bump into any society members on his way home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While Jethalal struggles with his situation, Bhide also begins to worry about Tapu Sena's upcoming final exam results.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is in a fix when everyone gathers at his house on learning about his condition. After they all offer different solutions, Dr Hathi gets ready to administer an injection.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As the oath is now known to everyone in Gokuldham Society, Daya's mother offers a solution that's even tougher to follow.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu has a nightmare about getting only 40 percent on his exams. Everyone has to spend a restless night after he calls them up one by one and tells them about his worries.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone arrives at Bhide's house to check the exam results, but get anxious about the delay. Sunder arrives with some much-anticipated news.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone applauds Bhide's teaching efforts for helping the children improve their results. Jethalal and Champaklal get an important phone call.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Nattu Kaka leaves Bagha, his nephew, to work for Jethalal at the shop. Later, Bagha is assigned to collect payment from Lachhuram.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal makes several calls in order to sell his paint boxes but all of his attempts fail. Later, he consults Bhide.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal worries about not being able to sell the paint boxes, and Daya steps in and sends him a potential client.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal plans to convince everyone to paint Gokuldham Society so he can sell the paint boxes to them, and Taarak decides to help him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide tells Tapu Sena there will be no money left to throw a New Year's party as all the money will be spent on painting the building.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After getting the green light for the New Year's party, Jethalal secretly tells the other men to meet up without their wives knowing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The men are caught in the act as they try to throw their own party, and Champaklal teaches them a lesson.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide negotiates with Sakharam as they work on the contract for the building's paint job; Daya and Jethalal are glad a deal is made.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The renovation at Gokuldham society finally starts. However, chaos ensues when the society realises they spend all the fund halfway through renovation.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sukharam is furious about the paint job contract and ends up ruining the job completely. Later, the residents have to come up with a solution.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone holds Jethalal responsible for the work Sukharam ruins; Champaklal proposes an idea after they fail to find a new contractor.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone comes together to fix the paint job gone wrong, and the finished work stuns them; Sukharam apologises to the residents.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents agree to do Satyanarayan Puja ritual to celebrate the finished paint job; Nattu Kaka returns to Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal has secretly been planning a secret party in the evening, but everyone seems to have found out somehow, and they all await his party.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents realise Champaklal's party is a Bhajan Party to thank God for his blessings and for making the paint job successful.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokuldham Society is full of quirky neighbours who laugh, fight, and come together through every challenge. A mix of comedy, emotion, and strong community spirit.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya, Madhavi, Komal, Anjali and Babita bring tiffins at Sodhi's place one by one. Bhide decides to go to Tapu Sena and ask about the Ganesh Utsav programme.

title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
subTitle: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Itti Si Khushi
subTitle: Anvita, a young caregiver, shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings. As she navigates her responsibilities and growing attachment to Virat, she's also supported by Sanjay, who harbours unrequited feelings for her.

title: Pushpa Impossible
subTitle: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal welcomes Baldev and his wife to his home. Baldev warns Popatlal in a subtle way. Everyone prepares for the wedding.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone is excited about the ceremony. Tapu and his friends decorate the premises. The truth about Rahul remains hidden.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Babita tries to remind Iyer of their anniversary, but Iyer does not seem to remember the day at all. However, Iyer has been planning a special surprise for her.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Iyer feels it is important to make his surprise even grander now that Babita is upset with him. He consults Sodhi and Taarak on buying her a car.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The women of Gokuldham complain about their husbands to each other. Meanwhile, Jethalal's customer is looking to sell a car.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Iyer buys the car from Mr Yogi to surprise Babita. Later, he gives her flowers and the car as the other residents get excited about the two.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Babita is excited about the car and takes it for a test drive. However, she encounters something strange on the drive to the temple.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Iyer and Babita report their stolen car to the police. However, they become the suspects when they learn that the car has already been registered as stolen.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal tries to save Iyer and Babita, but to no avail. Meanwhile, Daya and the others grow worried, but Abdul has a piece of information that might help the case.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham society rush to catch the real thief or the police will put them behind bars again.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal comes up with a plan to catch the thief, but it involves the other residents. Popatlal uses his journalistic skills to investigate.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Peter Fernandes meets Sodhi and asks him to bring the car back in exchange for money.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After successfully handing Peter over to the police, the Gokuldham residents gather to celebrate Babita and Iyer's anniversary.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Singhania Group of Industries' secretary asks Bagha to schedule a meeting with Jethalal to place an order. Later, Daya gives her lucky bangle to Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Popatlal fight with a stranger, who steals Jethalal's lucky bangle and Popatlal's umbrella, at the tea stall.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A man arrives at Gada Electronics and claims that he is the owner of the shop while Natu Kaka and Bagha try to get him out.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal files a complaint at the police station, and the inspector calls Jethalal to confirm Popatlal's story. Meanwhile, Mr Singhania heads to Gada Electronics to attend a meeting.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The kids play cricket and Tapu hits a shot that breaks Bhide's window. Bhide gets into a heated argument with Jethalal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone tries their best to pacify Bhide, who strongly opposes the kids from playing cricket in the compound.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal brings a new video game console home after Tapu asks him to get one. Tapu goes to bed early to get himself prepared for his all-day game session.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The parents of the Gokuldham Society feel upset upon seeing their kids play video games all day and start convincing them to play outside.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The parents of Gokuldham Society succeed in luring their kids back to the playground to play cricket.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone in Gokuldham Society is excited to see Dr Hathi as he returns home and joins the kids in their games.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The fun and games continue as the members of Gokuldham Society form two teams and compete with each other.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu impresses Bhide and Madhavi by helping them fix the computer. However, Bhide becomes hooked on using social media.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide and Madhavi are ecstatic after Bhide receives an email that claims he has won a jackpot of 1 crore, but he needs to transfer 50,000 rupees first.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After Bhide and Madhavi become rich, they scheme together about spending the money while keeping their relationships with the other residents the same.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide receives another email telling him to transfer 100,000 rupees in order to claim the jackpot, and he finds himself alone in the situation.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Since they cannot ask the residents for a loan, Bhide and Madhavi agree to pawn Madhavi's jewellery and use the money to claim the jackpot.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Bhide and Madhavi fantasise about what to do with the prize money, Popatlal warns the residents of a scam email that has been circulating.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide and Madhavi finally realise they have been tricked. A dangerous man visits the housing community.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Bhide tries to negotiate with the scammer, Abdul hears the conversation and brings all the residents to help Bhide.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents try to cheer Bhide up as he becomes disheartened after the incident. Later, the police inform them the IP address of the scammer has been found.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The police arrest the scammers, and the residents promise Bhide he will get his money back. Popatlal tells Tapu and his friends that a celebrity is coming to see them.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Darsheel Safary promotes his new film in Gokuldham. Everyone recalls Tapu and his friends' heroic moments.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal receives his grandfather's photograph from Champaklal and vows to keep this treasured family heirloom safe.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal contacts Taarak after losing his wallet, which contains his grandfather's photo. He blames himself for his carelessness in losing such a precious memento.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak assists Jethalal in the search for his wallet. Nattu Kaka suggests Jethalal find another way to get his grandfather's photograph.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal turns to Sundarlal for assistance in locating his grandfather's photo and opens up about his worries to friends in Gokuldham Society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal urges Daya to keep quiet about the missing wallet. Tapu finds out about the problem and decides to lend a hand.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Daya and Anjali turn to prayer, Jethalal and the Gokuldham residents exhaust every possibility in their search efforts.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu attempts to solve the problem creatively. Bagha searches for the thief. Jethalal prays desperately for a miracle.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal bravely tells Champaklal about the missing photograph, but an unforeseen turn of events follows.

subTitle: On one hand, everyone admires Popatlal's stunning sherwani, while on the other, Popatlal eagerly waits for Rahul to arrive.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While Tapu Sena and the rest of the society members rejoice at the ceremony, Popatlal anxiously waits for Rahul's reply.

subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The men discuss friendships on social media. The ladies of Gokuldham are elated due to the cosy climate caused by the rain.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal walks in to see the women dancing in the rain. A surprise awaits Jethalal as he reaches the shop and gets out of the raincoat that Daya made him wear in the morning.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal ensures that Iyer and Babita don't see him returning home splattered in mud. Iyer wants to shoot a video of Jethalal in dirty clothes.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Taarak comes home late from work, Anjali gets worried. Later, she finds Taarak's behaviour quite strange.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Anjali suspects that Taarak is hiding something in his laptop when he behaves in a secretive manner and she starts to worry.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya enters just as Anjali mulls over her next move. She's shocked when Anjali reveals the reason for her worry.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Anjali overhears a conversation between Daya and Jethalal, it upsets her deeply and she decides to leave her house.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Anjali hides in Jethalal and Daya's home. Jethalal follows Taarak and is shocked to see him with a woman.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After coming back home, Jethalal reveals the truth about Taarak and the woman to a shocked Anjali and Champaklal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After Taarak is confronted, he decides to reveal the truth about Kavita. The society members go to the police station.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The parents of Gokuldham Society are very happy and proud of Tapu Sena's efforts in promoting child education.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Madhavi excitedly looks forward to her wedding anniversary. Bhide starts falling in love with Bandya.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu Sena and the other members of Gokuldham Society think Bhide has bought a new scooter and ask for a party.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Gokhale becomes extremely upset about Bandya's accident. He insults Bhide but is stopped by a defensive Madhvi.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal exposes embarrassing stories from Jethalal's childhood. Tapu skips school to spend time with Champaklal's friends.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu and Jethalal plan to head to the camping site where Champaklal and his friends are staying.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is irked by Bagha's new scheme. Taarak is fed up of disturbances that bother him while he tries to work.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal rushes home from his shop and is in for a shock when Daya breaks the news of Tapu wanting to shave his head.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gadas are in a tight situation after learning about the reason behind Tapu's wish to shave his head.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone gathers in the compound of Gokuldham Society and tries to deter Tapu from taking a drastic decision.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu's parents and the society members are proud of him after learning that he shaved his head to support his friend suffering from leukaemia.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal gets highly influenced by London's culture and incorporates the lifestyle in Mumbai. So, when he meets the members of Gokuldham Society, he boasts of his new style.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal gets smitten by the English lady who visits Gokuldham Society in search of Jethalal. But when Daya learns about the lady, she feels insecure.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The ladies of Gokuldham Society meet Daya and fuel her insecurity towards Carey. Meanwhile, Champaklal gets startled by the commotion and calls Jethalal to resolve the matter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: All the members of Gokuldham Society discover Jethalal's alleged affair and stand in support of Daya. But when Jethalal learns about the allegations, he corrects the misapprehension.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya invites Carey home to give her a grand welcome. On the other hand, Champaklal gets annoyed by Jethalal's new hairstyle and impels him to get a new haircut.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Chaos ensues when Jethalal gets a haircut from a roadside barber while trying to avoid getting spotted by the members of Gokuldham Society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Carey visits Gokuldham Society and gets a grand welcome from all the residents. All members later convince her to cancel her hotel booking and live with them in Gokuldham.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Carey visits all the residents of Gokuldham Society, who help her settle in and clean her apartment. Popatlal later falls for Carey and looks for ways to spend more time with her.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham Society prepare for the first night of Navaratri. On the other hand, Sunder gives a surprise visit to everyone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The ladies of Gokuldham go to Ahmadabad with Daya in preparation for the festive season of Navratri, which is coming soon.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The ladies of Gokuldham society are still in Ahmadabad. They start to get worried that they will not be able to join the Navratri aarti ritual.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The Gokuldham ladies come back from Ahmadabad to join the ritual, but they unintentionally leave someone behind.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Other members learn that Popatlal gets lost. Daya tells Babuji about her experience in Ahmadabad. While the society begins the festive season of Navratri, Popatlal returns and blames everyone leave him behind.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal does not like that Popatlal may harbour feelings for Kerry. He decides to find a way to ruin their friendship.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Desparate for love, Popatlal decides to ask the ladies of Gokuldham for a makeover. He seeks guidance to impress Kerry.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal takes Kerry to the park for a date, but his behaviour starts to scare her. A group of goons beat him up on their way home.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Kerry tends to Popatlal, who gets beaten up. She happily retells her story to Daya, despite the date failing.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal talks to a friend on the phone about how the world has changed and hopes his family will enjoy long and thriving lives.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and Daya misunderstand each other, causing them to fail in bringing the boy home from Gada Electronics. Ajay Devgn encounters Champaklal and helps him return home safely.
